    -- Use the fact that (sin(r * x) - r * x) / x^2 → 0 as x → 0 to show that sin(r * x) / x → r as x → 0

have h₀ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by sorry

    have h₃ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by

        apply h₄.mono_left nhdsWithin_le_nhds |>.mono_right
        intro x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx ⊢
        aesop
      exact h₇
    -- Use the fact that the composition of tendsto functions is tendsto
    have h₈ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := h₀

      have h₁₂ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=

    have h₇ : (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) = (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) := by

          have h₁₄ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * ((1 : ℝ) / k)) / ((1 : ℝ) / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
            have h₁₅ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := h₁₃
            have h₁₆ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := h₁₂
            have h₁₇ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * ((1 : ℝ) / k)) / ((1 : ℝ) / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=
              h₁₆.comp h₁₅
            exact h₁₇
          exact h₁₄
        exact h₁₀
      have h₇ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (k : ℝ) * Real.sin (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
        have h₈ : (fun k : ℝ => (k : ℝ) * Real.sin (r / k)) = (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * ((1 : ℝ) / k)) / ((1 : ℝ) / k)) := by
          funext k
          by_cases hk : k = 0
          · simp_all
          · have h₉ : (k : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by exact_mod_cast hk
            have h₁₀ : Real.sin (r / k) = Real.sin (r * ((1 : ℝ) / k)) := by
              field_simp [h₉]
              <;> ring_nf
            calc
              (k : ℝ) * Real.sin (r / k) = (k : ℝ) * Real.sin (r * ((1 : ℝ) / k)) := by rw [h₁₀]
              _ = Real.sin (r * ((1 : ℝ) / k)) / ((1 : ℝ) / k) := by
                field_simp [h₉]
                <;> ring_nf
                <;> field_simp [h₉]
                <;> ring_nf
        rw [h₈]
        exact h₆
      exact h₇
    exact h₂
  exact h

have h_main : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by sorry
  sorry

have h : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
    -- Use the fact that sin(x) ≈ x for small x to approximate sin(r / k) ≈ r / k
    have h₁ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
      have h₂ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r / k) atTop (𝓝 0) := by
        -- Prove that r / k tends to 0 as k tends to infinity
        have h₃ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r / k) atTop (𝓝 0) := by
          -- Use the fact that 1 / k tends to 0 as k tends to infinity
          convert tendsto_const_nhds.div_atTop tendsto_id using 1
          <;> simp [div_eq_mul_inv]
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring
        exact h₃
      -- Show that r / k is non-zero for large k
      have h₄ : ∀ᶠ (k : ℝ) in atTop, r / k ≠ 0 := by
        filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop (abs r)] with k hk
        have h₅ : k > 0 := by linarith [abs_nonneg r]
        have h₆ : r / k ≠ 0 := by
          intro h₇
          have h₈ : r / k = 0 := h₇
          field_simp [h₅.ne'] at h₈
          <;>
          (try { cases' le_total 0 r with hr hr <;> simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, le_of_lt] <;> nlinarith }) <;>
          (try { linarith })
        exact h₆
      -- Combine the above results to show that r / k tends to 0 non-zero
      have h₅ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
        apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds
        exact h₂
      exact h₅
    -- Use the fact that sinh(x) ≈ x for small x to approximate sin(r / k) ≈ r / k
    have h₂ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
      have h₃ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
        -- Use the known limit of sin(x)/x as x approaches 0
        have h₄ : ContinuousAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (1 : ℝ) := by
          apply ContinuousAt.div
          · exact Real.continuous_sin.continuousAt
          · exact continuousAt_id
          · norm_num
        have h₅ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
          -- Use the known limit of sin(x)/x as x approaches 0
          have h₆ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] (0 : ℝ)) (𝓝 1) := by
            -- Use the known limit of sin(x)/x as x approaches 0
            have h₇ : Real.sin (0 : ℝ) = 0 := by norm_num
            have h₈ : HasDerivAt Real.sin (Real.cos (0 : ℝ)) (0 : ℝ) := Real.hasDerivAt_sin 0
            have h₉ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)) 1 (0 : ℝ) := by
              simpa using (hasDerivAt_id (0 : ℝ))
            have h₁₀ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) 1 (0 : ℝ) := by
              convert HasDerivAt.div h₈ h₉ (by norm_num) using 1
              <;> field_simp [Real.cos_zero] <;> ring
            have h₁₁ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] (0 : ℝ)) (𝓝 1) := by
              have h₁₂ : Filter.Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] (0 : ℝ)) (𝓝 1) := by
                have h₁₃ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) 1 (0 : ℝ) := h₁₀
                have h₁₄ : Filter.Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] (0 : ℝ)) (𝓝 1) := by
                  apply h₁₃.tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_nhds
                exact h₁₄
              exact h₁₂
            exact h₁₁
          exact h₆
        exact h₅
      exact h₃
    -- Combine the above results to show that k * sin(r / k) tends to r as k tends to infinity
    have h₃ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
      have h₄ : (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) = (fun k : ℝ => (r / (r / k)) * Real.sin (r / k)) := by
        funext k
        by_cases h₅ : r = 0
        · simp [h₅]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
        · have h₆ : r / (r / k) = k := by
            field_simp [h₅]
            <;> ring
          rw [h₆]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [h₅]
          <;> ring_nf
      rw [h₄]
      -- Use the fact that r / k tends to 0 as k tends to infinity to approximate sin(r / k) ≈ r / k
      have h₅ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (r / (r / k)) * Real.sin (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
        have h₆ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (r / (r / k)) * Real.sin (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
          have h₇ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := h₁
          have h₈ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h₂
          have h₉ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (r / (r / k)) * Real.sin (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
            have h₁₀ : (fun k : ℝ => (r / (r / k)) * Real.sin (r / k)) = (fun k : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r / k) / (r / k))) := by
              funext k
              by_cases h₁₁ : r = 0
              · simp [h₁₁]
                <;> ring_nf
                <;> field_simp
                <;> ring_nf
              · field_simp [h₁₁]
                <;> ring_nf
                <;> field_simp [h₁₁]
                <;> ring_nf
            rw [h₁₀]
            -- Use the fact that sin(r / k) / (r / k) tends to 1 as k tends to infinity
            have h₁₁ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r / k) / (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 1) := by
              have h₁₂ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := h₁
              have h₁₃ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h₂
              have h₁₄ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r / k) / (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 1) := by
                have h₁₅ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := h₁
                have h₁₆ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h₂
                have h₁₇ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r / k) / (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 1) :=
                  h₁₆.comp h₁₅
                exact h₁₇
              exact h₁₄
            -- Multiply by r to get the final result
            have h₁₂ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r / k) / (r / k))) atTop (𝓝 (r * 1)) := by
              apply Tendsto.const_mul r h₁₁
            have h₁₃ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r / k) / (r / k))) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
              simpa using h₁₂
            exact h₁₃
          exact h₉
        exact h₆
      exact h₅
    exact h₃
  exact h
